output.reasoning: Selected the Tuna Pasta Salad as a lunch option to remove because its ready-to-eat pasta salad form and dressing make it prone to leakage and messy eating. Excluded Salmon Salad Wrap and Turkey Sandwich (both described as portable/grab-and-go) and Caprese Sandwich (relatively neat). Excluded the Stuffed Bell Peppers entry because it is a dinner, not a lunch.
